description: LIKE expression in SELECT returns a non-nullable bool when the input column is NOT NULL

columns.name: starts_with_a
columns.note: LIKE on NOT NULL column returns non-nullable bool

name: like_returns_bool
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersStartingWithA
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name LIKE 'A%' AS starts_with_a FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
